understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid while avoiding spikes; complete all levels to win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Only horizontal MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT allowed; character then auto-falls in gravity direction (y increases downward) until landing on solid tile, hazard, or goal. CLICK removes breakable 'x' blocks at target_position. Spikes 'u'/'v' instantly end run on landing. UNDO reverts last action. 50 turns/attempt, 2 attempts/level; corridor_scan and landing previews aid path planning.
